hero.subtitle: Since math became mandatory for the MBO diploma, we help students with targeted guidance and proven methods to succeed.

about.title: Why choose us?
about.subtitle: We understand the challenges of MBO math and provide the support you need to succeed.

features.title: Targeted approach
features.description: Personal guidance tailored to your level and goals

features.title: Proven methods
features.description: Effective teaching materials and techniques for optimal learning results

features.title: High success rate
features.description: 95% of our students pass their math test

features.title: Experienced teachers
features.description: Specialized in MBO math with years of experience

about.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of students who have successfully passed their MBO math test with our guidance.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: From individual guidance to group lessons - we offer flexible solutions for every learning style.

items.title: Personal guidance
items.description: Individual lessons tailored to your pace and needs.

items.title: Small groups
items.description: You can also take lessons together with up to 3 fellow students. This is more affordable and fun.

items.title: Specific exam preparation
items.description: We practice specifically on the skills and knowledge needed for the MBO math exam.

items.title: Location flexibility
items.description: Lessons can take place in Amsterdam-East. For groups of 3-4 students, I also come to your location within the Amsterdam region.

items.title: Online lessons
items.description: Would you prefer to learn from home? That's possible, at a reduced rate.

targetGroups.title: Who is this suitable for?
targetGroups.subtitle: Our lessons are accessible to anyone who struggles with mathematics, regardless of background or level.

items.title: MBO students level 2, 3 and 4
items.description: Who struggle with mathematics and need additional support.

items.title: BBL students
items.description: Who struggle with the mathematics component of their education alongside their work.

items.title: Adults
items.description: Who have returned to school and find mathematics as an obstacle.

items.title: Students with dyscalculia
items.description: Or other mathematics difficulties that require special attention.

targetGroups.stillUnsureText: No problem! We offer a free introductory meeting to see if our approach suits you.

whyChoose.title: Why do students choose us?
whyChoose.subtitle: Our approach ensures that students not only improve in mathematics, but also gain more confidence.

reasons.title: Calm and clear explanation
reasons.description: Without rushing, with all the time for your questions and understanding.

reasons.title: Patient and supportive
reasons.description: We work together on your confidence in mathematics.

reasons.title: Extensive experience
reasons.description: With different education levels and diverse target groups.

reasons.title: Practical and understandable
reasons.description: I make mathematics practical and understandable, so you can apply it immediately.

whyChoose.ctaSubtitle: Don't let mathematics hold you back. With the right guidance, you can do it!

pricing.flexibleSubtitle: In addition to our group programs, we also offer individual lessons for personal guidance.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to start? Contact us for a free introductory meeting and discover how we can help you.
contact.amsterdamAreaDesc: Flexible locations: at home, at school, library or online
contact.onlineLessonsDesc: Available for all programs via Zoom or Teams
contact.freeIntroDesc: No obligations, just getting to know each other and see if we're a good match.
